question: What are the students' first names who have both cats and dogs as pets?

payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Fname FROM Student s JOIN Has_Pet hp1 ON s.StuID = hp1.StuID JOIN Pets p1 ON hp1.PetID = p1.PetID JOIN Has_Pet hp2 ON s.StuID = hp2.StuID JOIN Pets p2 ON hp2.PetID = p2.PetID WHERE LOWER(p1.PetType) = 'dog' AND LOWER(p2.PetType) = 'cat' AND p1.PetID != p2.PetID;"}
